title: thymus zygis subsp. sylvestris
intro: Thymus zygis subsp. sylvestris, also known as the Spanish thyme, is a subspecies of the thyme plant, a low-growing, woody perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating wounds, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Thymus zygis subsp. sylvestris include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, essential oils, and tinctures, allowing for various uses in traditional medicine and aromatherapy.
